productDisplayName: Nike Men Lengo FG White Sports Shoes
description: Built for speed on hard surfaces, the nike Lengo FG is a lightweight soccer cleat designed to give you revolutionary speed and ultimate in traction, cushioning and control. The entire shoe is designed such that it mirrors the shape of the foot and offers a premium Fit, allowing you to strike the ball fast and clear.UpperUltra-lightweight synthetic leather adjusts to the foot shape and locks it down in placeLace-ups for a snug, customised fitSwoosh overlays on the sides for greater midfoot supportUniform surface with stitch detailing for greater ball feel and accuracyMidsolePhylon midsole with injected EVA footbed for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleTFU plates with cleats for better gripWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
